queries.question: Show all articles, mobile apps that they were published on and author names.
queries.sql:
SELECT
Article.title,
Mobile_App.name,
Author.fullname
FROM Article
JOIN News_Agency ON News_Agency.id = Article.newsAgencyId
JOIN AuthorArticle ON AuthorArticle.authorID = Article.id
JOIN Author ON Author.id = AuthorArticle.authorID
JOIN Mobile_App ON News_Agency.MobileAppID = Mobile_App.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?name ?fullname WHERE {
  ?article a :Articles .
  ?news_agency a :News_Agency .
  ?article p:hasNews_Agency ?news_agency .
  ?authorarticle a :Article_Authors .
  ?authorarticle p:authorId ?authorid_l .
  ?article p:id ?id_r .
  ?author a :Authors .
  ?authorarticle p:hasAuthor ?author .
  ?mobile_app a :Mobile_App .
  ?news_agency p:hasMobile_App ?mobile_app .
  ?article p:title ?title .
  ?mobile_app p:name ?name .
  ?author p:name ?fullname .
  FILTER(STR(?authorid_l) = STR(?id_r))
}

queries.question: List all the mobile apps with their published articles and dates.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
Mobile_App.name,
Article.title,
Article.publishedDate
FROM Mobile_App
JOIN News_Agency ON News_Agency.id = Mobile_App.id
JOIN Article ON Article.newsAgencyID = News_Agency.MobileAppID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?title ?publisheddate WHERE {
  ?mobile_app a :Mobile_App .
  ?news_agency a :News_Agency .
  ?news_agency p:id ?id_l .
  ?mobile_app p:id ?id_r .
  ?article a :Articles .
  ?article p:hasNews_Agency ?news_agency .
  ?mobile_app p:name ?name .
  ?article p:title ?title .
  ?article p:publishedDate ?publisheddate .
  FILTER(STR(?id_l) = STR(?id_r))
}

queries.question: List all the websites, their mobile apps and their published articles and dates.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
Website.name,
Website.url, Mobile_App.name,
Article.title,
Article.publishedDate
FROM Website
JOIN News_Agency ON News_Agency.id = Website.id
JOIN Article ON Article.newsAgencyID = News_Agency.websiteID JOIN Mobile_App ON News_Agency.MobileAppID = Mobile_App.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?url ?name2 ?title ?publisheddate WHERE {
  ?website a :Website .
  ?news_agency a :News_Agency .
  ?news_agency p:id ?id_l .
  ?website p:id ?id_r .
  ?article a :Articles .
  ?article p:hasNews_Agency ?news_agency .
  ?mobile_app a :Mobile_App .
  ?news_agency p:hasMobile_App ?mobile_app .
  ?website p:name ?name .
  ?website p:url ?url .
  ?mobile_app p:name ?name2 .
  ?article p:title ?title .
  ?article p:publishedDate ?publisheddate .
  FILTER(STR(?id_l) = STR(?id_r))
}

queries.question: List all platforms and articles published there along with the published date.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
Website.name,
Website.url,
Article.title,
Article.publishedDate
FROM Website
JOIN News_Agency ON News_Agency.id = Website.id
JOIN Article ON Article.newsAgencyID = News_Agency.websiteID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?url ?title ?publisheddate WHERE {
  ?website a :Website .
  ?news_agency a :News_Agency .
  ?news_agency p:id ?id_l .
  ?website p:id ?id_r .
  ?article a :Articles .
  ?article p:hasNews_Agency ?news_agency .
  ?website p:name ?name .
  ?website p:url ?url .
  ?article p:title ?title .
  ?article p:publishedDate ?publisheddate .
  FILTER(STR(?id_l) = STR(?id_r))
}

queries.question: Show all articles, websites and mobile apps on which they were published, along with the author names.
queries.sql:
SELECT
Article.title,
Website.name, Website.url, Mobile_App.name,
Author.fullname
FROM Article
JOIN News_Agency ON News_Agency.id = Article.newsAgencyId
JOIN AuthorArticle ON AuthorArticle.authorID = Article.id
JOIN Author ON Author.id = AuthorArticle.authorID
JOIN Website ON News_Agency.websiteID = Website.id JOIN Mobile_App ON News_Agency.MobileAppID = Mobile_App.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?name ?url ?name2 ?fullname WHERE {
  ?article a :Articles .
  ?news_agency a :News_Agency .
  ?article p:hasNews_Agency ?news_agency .
  ?authorarticle a :Article_Authors .
  ?authorarticle p:authorId ?authorid_l .
  ?article p:id ?id_r .
  ?author a :Authors .
  ?authorarticle p:hasAuthor ?author .
  ?website a :Website .
  ?news_agency p:hasWebsite ?website .
  ?mobile_app a :Mobile_App .
  ?news_agency p:hasMobile_App ?mobile_app .
  ?article p:title ?title .
  ?website p:name ?name .
  ?website p:url ?url .
  ?mobile_app p:name ?name2 .
  ?author p:name ?fullname .
  FILTER(STR(?authorid_l) = STR(?id_r))
}

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?title ?name ?fullname WHERE {
  ?article a :Articles .
  ?news_agency a :News_Agency .
  ?article p:hasNews_Agency ?news_agency .
  ?authorarticle a :Article_Authors .
  ?authorarticle p:authorId ?authorid_l .
  ?article p:id ?id_r .
  ?author a :Authors .
  ?authorarticle p:hasAuthor ?author .
  ?mobile_app a :Mobile_App .
  ?news_agency p:hasMobile_App ?mobile_app .
  ?article p:title ?title .
  ?mobile_app p:name ?name .
  ?author p:name ?fullname .
  FILTER(STR(?authorid_l) = STR(?id_r))
} }
  full: { SELECT ?title ?name ?url ?name2 ?fullname WHERE {
  ?article a :Articles .
  ?news_agency a :News_Agency .
  ?article p:hasNews_Agency ?news_agency .
  ?authorarticle a :Article_Authors .
  ?authorarticle p:authorId ?authorid_l .
  ?article p:id ?id_r .
  ?author a :Authors .
  ?authorarticle p:hasAuthor ?author .
  ?website a :Website .
  ?news_agency p:hasWebsite ?website .
  ?mobile_app a :Mobile_App .
  ?news_agency p:hasMobile_App ?mobile_app .
  ?article p:title ?title .
  ?website p:name ?name .
  ?website p:url ?url .
  ?mobile_app p:name ?name2 .
  ?author p:name ?fullname .
  FILTER(STR(?authorid_l) = STR(?id_r))
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?title ?name ?url ?fullname WHERE {
  ?article a :Articles .
  ?news_agency a :News_Agency .
  ?article p:hasNews_Agency ?news_agency .
  ?authorarticle a :Article_Authors .
  ?authorarticle p:authorId ?authorid_l .
  ?article p:id ?id_r .
  ?author a :Authors .
  ?authorarticle p:hasAuthor ?author .
  ?website a :Website .
  ?news_agency p:hasWebsite ?website .
  ?article p:title ?title .
  ?website p:name ?name .
  ?website p:url ?url .
  ?author p:name ?fullname .
  FILTER(STR(?authorid_l) = STR(?id_r))
} }
}
